name: André Rieu - Welcome to My World
original_name: André Rieu - Welcome to My World
overview: From Australia to Argentina via Mexico and Maastricht, viewers join André and the members of the famous Johann Strauss Orchestra in a spectacular journey celebrating music, waltzes and his spellbinding showmanship. Each episode documents an exhilarating part of the maestro’s life, as well as showcasing new concert performances.

trailers.title: André Rieu - Welcome to My World: Episode 4 - The Veterans Concert (Clip 1 of 5)
